---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a small, useful improvement for OpenPractice Toolkit
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What practice problem would this solve?

## Intended Users

Who would benefit?

## Proposed Behavior

What should the feature do?

## Local-First And Privacy Notes

Does this involve audio, video, practice history, uploads, or optional network use?

## Export Or Interop Notes

Should this support MIDI, MusicXML, WAV, or another open format?

## Additional Context

Links, examples, sketches, or related tools.
